title: Framed Posters, Matte
description:
Your original artwork will be printed in picture-perfect quality and secured by a Black Perspex picture frame, as well as a white mat board inner-frame. The final product will have a beautiful matte finish. Choose from three sizes and both horizontal and vertical image orientations.
.:Black Perspex picture frame

.:Matte poster finish

.:White inner matboard

.:Three sizes to choose from

.:Horizontal and vertical options available
